changelog:
v1.3.0 (2026-03-15)

  • New: Post Dates endpoint — override modified/published dates via direct DB (backfill support)
  • New: Bulk Post Dates — batch update dates for up to 100 posts
  • New: Post Audit — single-call health check (content, SEO, schema, links, word count, featured image)
  • New: Sideload Media — upload image from URL or base64 and set as featured image in one call
  • New: Preflight — site readiness check (permalinks, categories, AI bot access, plugins, Rank Math config)
  • New: Auto-updater — plugin now checks for updates from GitHub releases

v1.1.2

  • Elementor data, Rank Math meta/schema, cache controls, robots.txt management
